description: As an ESG Analyst, model the exposure of a 150-building real estate portfolio to New York City's Local Law 97 fines. Using the raw portfolio data at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/nyc_ll84_portfolio.csv and the statutory limits at ~/Documents/ll97_limits.txt, generate an Excel workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/ll97_compliance_model.xlsx. The model must calculate the LL97_Limit for each building based on property type, Allowed_Emissions (Gross Floor Area * Limit), Excess_Emissions (Total GHG - Allowed Emissions, minimum 0), and Estimated_Penalty (Excess Emissions * $268). Include a summary sheet reporting the total count of non-compliant buildings and the grand total portfolio financial penalty.
